class Solution:
    def semiOrderedPermutation(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        pos_1 = nums.index(1)
        pos_n = nums.index(n)
        
        # Calculate swaps to bring 1 to the first position
        swaps_1 = pos_1
        
        # Calculate swaps to bring n to the last position
        swaps_n = n - 1 - pos_n
        
        # If 1 is after n, moving 1 to the front will shift n's position by 1
        if pos_1 > pos_n:
            swaps_n -= 1
        
        return swaps_1 + swaps_n
